home.noGamesDescription: Be the one who starts it. Organize your first game and get people together.

landing.title: opengym
landing.subtitle: The easiest way to organize and manage your games with friends
landing.createGamesDesc: Organize and schedule games with a few clicks
landing.manageParticipantsDesc: Easily track who is joining and manage waitlists
landing.openSourceDesc: Built in the open on GitHub.
landing.cta: Ready to organize your next game?
landing.ctaDescription: Sign in with Google to create games, invite friends, and manage participants effortlessly.

game.name: Game Name
game.organizerHint: You are the organizer of this game
game.confirmLeave: Are you sure you want to leave this game?
game.confirmLeaveDescription: You can always join again later if spots are available.
game.completeFieldsBeforePublishing: Complete all required fields before publishing.
game.selectDateTimeToSchedule: Select a date and time to schedule publishing.
game.invalidDateTime: Invalid date and time. Please pick a valid value.
game.youCanEditEverything: You can edit everything on this page
game.anyoneWithLink: Anyone with the link can see the game and join it.
game.yourePublishedMessage: You're officially published! Send the link to get people involved.
game.youreScheduledMessage: This game will be published and visible to others when the time comes.
game.finishPublishingMessage: Finish setting up your game to publish it.
game.cantJoinFull: You can't join as the main group is full.
game.waitingForSpot: Waiting for a spot to open up
game.getsPublishedIn: This game will be available to join in
game.loginToJoinWhenPublished: Log in to be notified when this game is published and join right away!
game.loginToParticipate: Log in to see all details and join the game.

errors.unauthorized: You need to be logged in
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that

publish.oncePublishedAnyone: . Once published, anyone with the link will be able to see and join it.

participants.beFirstToSignUp: Be the first to sign up and get people excited!
participants.changeToNotGoing: If you change to "not going", you'll be removed from the participant list and move to the bottom of the waitlist if there's space. Are you sure?
participants.howManyGuestsLimited: How many guests are you bringing? (max {{max}})
participants.noGuestsAllowed: This game does not allow guests.
participants.joiningWillDisplace: Joining this game will push other participants to the waitlist or "not going" list to make room for you. As the organizer, you have priority. Do you want to continue?
participants.leaveWaitlistConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave the waitlist?

reimbursements.title: Reimbursements
reimbursements.waitForFreezeToSend: Wait to send your reimbursement until the organizer freezes the game.
reimbursements.freezeGameToAccess: Freeze this game first to access reimbursement tracking.
reimbursements.freezeRequiredDescription: This page is available only after the game is frozen.
reimbursements.organizerOnlyDescription: Only the game organizer can view and manage reimbursements.
reimbursements.includeReferenceInstruction: Include this code in your reimbursement description so the organizer can identify your reimbursement.
reimbursements.notSentYet: You haven't marked this as sent yet

freeze.implication1: Participants cannot change their RSVP status
freeze.implication3: Only the description can be edited
freeze.freezeNowWarning: Once frozen, participants will not be able to change their participation status. This signals that the game details are final and participants can plan accordingly and arrange reimbursement with you.
freeze.scheduleFreezeWarning: At the scheduled time, participants will not be able to change their participation status. This signals that the game details are final and participants can plan accordingly.
freeze.clearFreezeWarning: Clearing the freeze will allow participants to change their participation status again. This may cause confusion as they may have already arranged reimbursement based on the frozen status.
freeze.warningNoParticipantChanges: Participants cannot change their RSVP or guest count
freeze.warningParticipantsCanReimburse: Participants can assume the game details are final and arrange reimbursement
freeze.clearWarningParticipantsCanChange: Participants can change their participation status again
freeze.clearWarningCausesUncertainty: May cause confusion if participants already arranged reimbursement
freeze.scheduledInfo: This game will be frozen at the scheduled time. Participants will no longer be able to change their participation status after that time.
freeze.gameFrozenNoChanges: This game is frozen. You cannot change your participation status.
freeze.cannotJoinFrozenGame: This game is frozen. You cannot join frozen games.
